title: Player Corpses
description: A highly configurable mod/datapack that adds lootable corpses where the player died, allowing them to retrieve their items whenever
body:
### **A highly configurable mod/datapack that adds lootable corpses where the player died**

### **✨ Now with Trinkets Updated, Trinkets Canary and Trinkets Continued support! ✨**

## Corpses 💀

**It makes it so that instead of players dropping their items around randomly, they will now leave behind a corpse with their skin and name from which they can later retrieve their stuff.**   

**To retreieve the items from the corpse the player must locate where they died and sneak while being near the corpse (or right click if the option is selected), their items should pop back in their inventory at their original slots and the corpse should disappear.**

**There is no despawn timer unless added via the config screen**

![Player Corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a43494a24c9ae3df314bec2e77472e319cf8e768.png)

## Coprse Finder ⚙️

**The Corpse Finder Screen allows the player to see all the currently loaded corpses and their coordinates**

**Can be accessed by typing: /trigger corpse_finder**

![Corpse Finder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b8802a9c0868eb285f2b70ad952abadbd80f12.png)

## Configeration Screen ⚙️

**The Config Screen offers many options for players to choose how they want the pack to work to match their playstyle.**

**Can be accessed by typing: /trigger config**

<details>
<summary>Config Options</summary>
  
- **Despawn Timer:** 
Corpses spawned when a player dies will despawn after that amount of time passes
  
- **Has Gore:** 
Corpses spawned when a player dies will have blood and bone particles and sounds
  
- **Can Get Zombified:** 
When a player dies to a zombie a corpse wont spawn, instead a zombie with that player's head will spawn with all of the player's items, to get them back they must kill it
  
- **Gives Death Coords:**
Players will get a message with their death coordinates in chat after they die

- **Sorts Loot From Corpses:**
When a player loots a corpse, the items from it will be put in the slots the player had them in when they died
  
- **Can Only be Looted by Owner:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will only be able to be looted by that same player
  
- **Can be Looted by Right Clicking:**
Corpses will be able to be looted by right clicking on it rather than sneaking
  
- **Instant Looting:**
Corpses will be able to be looted instantly after sneaking near them
  
- **Stays After Being Looted:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will stay forever, even after they have been looted by a player
  
- **Gives Player's Head:**
Looting a player's corpse will give that player's head along with the rest of the items
  
- **Has Player's Name:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will have their name
  
- **Has Description:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will have a description explaining how to loot them
  
- **Floats in Water:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will float in water
  
- **Floats in Lava:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will float in lava
  
- **Can Burn:**
Corpses spawned when a player dies will burn when in lava or fire

- **Saves Items From Void:** 
Corpses spawned when a player dies in the void will float before the damage zone, able to be looted

- **Remove Corpse Finder Screen Access:**
No one will be able to access the corpse finder screen, even after typing /trigger corpse_finder

- **Remove Config Screen Access in Survival:**
No one will be able to access this config screen in survival mode, even after typing /trigger config
  
</details>

![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08729dc8f2bcdb20086f09eed69ef8e577f67bb8.png)

![Config 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dac2ad44960db5847ad6b0dbe44b12e2d041310.png)

![Config 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/695d7318cb157c5a7e10d87cfdf5c3834c7b2647.png)

![Config 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2c22612228cac2a85acad009187d081f623184.png)
